Fortune reports that AI oversight is moving from policy memos into day-to-day operations as companies connect model behavior to revenue and customer support workflows.

Subscribe to Fortune Daily

Executives now want to know how a deployment is supervised, who can pause it, and what evidence remains after a model-driven action is reviewed or reversed.

Read more from Fortune

This is making observability, controlled rollback, and explicit review ownership central parts of AI delivery instead of post-launch cleanup.
